name: Keeper of the Shrine
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>廟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>びょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Dragon monster. While this card is in your hand or GY, if a face-up Dragon monster on the field, except "Keeper of the Shrine", is sent to the GY by a card effect or because it was destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card, then, if that monster sent to the GY is a Normal Monster, you can add 1 Dragon Normal Monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Keeper of the Shrine" once per turn.
mnst_eff: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Dragon monster. While this card is in your hand or GY, if a face-up Dragon monster on the field, except "Keeper of the Shrine", is sent to the GY by a card effect or because it was destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card, then, if that monster sent to the GY is a Normal Monster, you can add 1 Dragon Normal Monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Keeper of the Shrine" once per turn.
eff: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Dragon monster. While this card is in your hand or GY, if a face-up Dragon monster on the field, except "Keeper of the Shrine", is sent to the GY by a card effect or because it was destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card, then, if that monster sent to the GY is a Normal Monster, you can add 1 Dragon Normal Monster from your GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Keeper of the Shrine" once per turn.

sets.set: Rise of the True Dragons Structure Deck

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
